title: PvP Essentials
description: Clean vanilla friendly PvP pack with low fire, clearer liquids, reduced particles, quieter sounds, and better visibility.
body:
# PVP Essentials ⚔️

> **A clean, vanilla friendly PvP resource pack focused on better visibility, less clutter, and smoother combat.**

**PVP Essentials** improves Minecraft combat visuals without changing the vanilla feeling.

It is made for players who want low fire, reduced particles, smaller items, clearer liquids, quieter sounds, and a cleaner PvP setup overall.

Perfect for **PvP**, **Crystal PvP**, **Survival**, **UHC**, **SMPs**, and cleaner everyday gameplay.

---

## Overview 📌

| Category         | Details                               |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| **Edition**      | Minecraft: Java Edition               |
| **Pack Type**    | Resource Pack                         |
| **Style**        | Vanilla inspired PvP                  |
| **Changes**      | Visual and sound only                 |
| **Dependencies** | None required                         |
| **Best For**     | PvP, Crystal PvP, Survival, SMPs, UHC |

---

## Features ✨

### Combat Visibility ⚔️

* Low fire and low soul fire
* Reduced explosion particles
* Cleaner crystal explosion visuals
* Hidden smoke and poof particles
* Reduced distracting particles
* Hidden eating particles
* Smaller totem pop particles

### Items & Models 🧰

* Adjusted shield model
* Smaller food items
* Smaller utility items
* Bow and crossbow state textures
* Cleaner fishing rod textures
* Transparent fishing hook / bobber
* Smaller spyglass model

### Liquids, Blocks & Overlays 👁️

* Clearer water textures
* Clearer lava textures
* Classic old lava texture
* Clean ore textures
* Removed pumpkin overlay
* Removed spyglass overlay

### Quieter Sounds 🔊

* Quieter rain sounds
* Quieter fire damage sounds
* Quieter explosion sounds

---

## Why use PVP Essentials? 🛡️

Minecraft combat can get messy. Fire, particles, explosions, overlays, and large items can block your view during fights.

**PVP Essentials** reduces those distractions while keeping the game close to vanilla.

**~~Default clutter~~ → Cleaner PvP, better visibility, smoother gameplay.**

---

## Recommended Combination 🧩

Works very well together with:

**[Smaller Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smaller_tools)** ⚒️

Use both packs together for smaller tools, cleaner items, and a more compact PvP setup.

---

## Compatibility ✅

| Minecraft Version           | Supported |
| --------------------------- | --------- |
| **Modern Java versions**    | ✅         |
| **1.20.x - 1.21.x**         | ✅         |
| **26.1.x**                  | ✅         |
| **Older versions may work** | ⚠️        |

Some older versions may work, but certain textures, models, or sounds can depend on Minecraft's file names.

---

## Usage & Permissions 📦

You may use **PVP Essentials** in modpacks, videos, screenshots, PvP clients, and personal setups with proper credit to **Yannis_** and this project link.

Please do **not** sell, reupload, redistribute, monetize directly, or claim this pack as your own without permission.
